---
title: "Next generation of type 2 diabetes prevention"
image: images/logo
title-block-banner: false
about:
    template: jolla
    image-width: 35em
    image-shape: rounded
    links:
      - text: "For researchers"
        href: "wp1/index.qmd"
      - text: "For participant"
        href: "participant-en.qmd"
---
![](/images/XXX)
